attempts.strategy: Build the section Cech complex as a CosimplicialObject Ab then apply alternatingCofaceMapComplex for d²=0 for free

attempts.insight: REUSABLE technique for simplicial-functor-over-Sigma: Sigma.hom_ext;intro σ; Sigma.ι_desc; index equality via funext+simp[unop_comp,comp_toOrderHom]; transport Sigma.ι across it with a generic eqToHom-transport helper; collapse homOfLE=eqToHom by subsingleton; combine with ← Functor.map_comp.
